data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the integration of deposit hold/capture, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or functionality of this integration. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: Deposit hold/capture integration is not evidenced in the prior steps.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
